Video.summary: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 2"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.
Video.title: Wildbound - "New Zealand"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff scour the rugged mountains of southern Arizona in search of the elusive Coues deer, known to hunters as the “Grey Ghost.” Through scorching sun and shifting winds, they test their skill and patience chasing one of North America’s most elusive big game animals.
Video.title: "Arizona Coues Deer"

Video.summary: Motorcycle junkie and Army veteran Dave Allen recounts the terrifying prospect of facing chemical warfare during Operation Desert Storm with host Jay Garstecki and special guest Paul Sr. from American Choppers.
Video.title: "Dave Allen"

Video.summary: We listen to guides and anglers on how they attempt to hook into the migrating tarpon that pass thru PCB’s beautiful beach waters each summer. It’s a lesson in humility, respect and yes....luck.
Video.title: "Tarpon Telegraph"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin Leake and a fellow guide search for redfish along the beach, but Mother Nature has other ideas and gives them a show they didn’t expect.
Video.title: "Red to Black to Jack"

Video.summary: “Part of our responsibility as citizens in this country is to make sure we not only take care of these resources but we hand it off to the next generation in better condition that we found it.” -Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's Join Bob in New Mexico as he talks about taking care of our natural resources for future generations. Special thanks to Express UU Bar Ranch
Video.title: RMEF - "Better Than We Found It"

Video.summary: On this episode, we travel to Walker, Minnesota to highlight a great organization tucked back in the woods called Camp Bliss! Camp Bliss hosts a wide arrange of events throughout the year that are tailored for Veterans to find rest, relaxation and respite. We tag along on an Ice Fishing outing, a turkey hunt and a Women's Veterans retreat as we highlight this great organization and the heroes they serve. We also highlight Des Moine Iowa SCHEELS hometown hero, Navy Veteran Steve Booth!
Video.title: "Camp Bliss"

Video.summary: On opening day of Missouri’s gun season, hunters from around the state seek ridges and box blinds throughout the “Show Me” state in search of mature whitetail bucks. For Nikki Boxler and the Winchester Deer Camp, it’s no different. With Winchester’s in hand, Nikki and crew play cat and mouse with several mature bucks at Indian Hill Outfitters in Pike County.
Video.title: "Midwest Monarchs"

Video.summary: Every season, just like clockwork, mission-driven longboards gobble their way across the plains of South Dakota, the cornfields of Iowa, the timbered ridges of Michigan and the cattle ground of Kansas looking for their soulmates in one of the most celebrated hunting seasons in America…the wild turkey breeding season. Join Team Winchester as they stalk, call, flank and roost boss gobblers into range from coast to coast.
Video.title: “Lovesick Longbeards”

Video.summary: Nestled in the hills of Ohio just west of the Appalachians is a very special deer camp ripe with memories from deer season’s past. With the development of the 350 Legend straight-walled cartridge by Winchester in 2019, a world of opportunities now existed in states like Ohio and Michigan. In this episode, with the 350 Legend in hand, three mature whitetails meet their maker, from the same blind, over the course of three seasons.
Video.title: "Remembering A Legend"

Video.summary: Jennifer Brooks has spent her life answering the call to serve. From flying Blackhawk helicopters on multiple combat missions during two tours in Iraq to now serving as an Air Medical Pilot and first responder, her story is one of courage, sacrifice, and humility. In this episode of Storytellers, we join Jennifer in the field for a hunt that offers a rare moment to slow down, reflect, and honor a life dedicated to protecting others.
Video.title: "Bucks for the Brave: Women's Hunt"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger take Plantation Boat Mart’s new 36’ Invincible out to the swordfish grounds.
Video.title: "Swordfishing out of Plantation Boat Mart"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger break in their new Invincible Catamaran with a trip to fish out of Palm Beach with their friend Captain Dave Fields.
Video.title: "Palm Beach in the new Invincible Catamaran"

Image.alt: "Palm Beach in the new Invincible Catamaran"
"Palm Beach in the new Invincible Catamaran"
"Palm Beach in the new Invincible Catamaran"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger fly kites with Captain Dave Fields for a great day of sailfishing out of Sailfish Marina in Palm Beach.
Video.title: "Palm Beach Sailfishing"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger take a long run out into the Gulf from Key West to sample the bottom fishing and the long range capability of their new Invincible Catamaran.
Video.title: "Way Out in the Gulf Part 1"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger continue fishing after taking a long run out into the Gulf from Key West to sample the bottom fishing and the long range capability of their new Invincible Catamaran.
Video.title: "Way Out in the Gulf Part 2"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger fish out of Key West for tunas and sailfish while battling big seas and big sharks.
Video.title: "Chasing Pelagics in Big Seas Out of Key West"

Image.alt: "Chasing Pelagics in Big Seas Out of Key West"
"Chasing Pelagics in Big Seas Out of Key West"
"Chasing Pelagics in Big Seas Out of Key West"

Video.summary: On this episode, we flashback to one of our favorite episodes of Season 2! Capt. Danny joins his good buddy and talented marine artist, Stephen Ferrell. The two of them aim to fish some of Stephen’s favorite paddle-board spots here in Melbourne, Florida. Tune in and see what they can make happen on a windy day seeking the elusive Snook!
Video.title: "Flashback Fa-reel"

Video.summary: During this episode of Ship Shape TV Essentials the SSTV team is at - John’s lake house on Tupper Lake, NY, where they are tackling a new paint Job using Interlux’s paint specifically designed for aluminum hulls. John and the crew take us step by step on what takes to paint on aluminum hulls as well as some other tips from guest hosts.
Video.title: Essentials - "Painting Aluminum Hulls"

Video.summary: Tyler and Colton Jordan go after the eastern bird in the quest for Colton's first ever Grand Slam. David Blanton also hunts opening day and has 6 gobblers come into the decoy.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Georgia Opener"

Video.summary: Colton and Tyler Jordan continue their hunt for the single season turkey grand slam in Texas as they both try to put their tag on a long spur Rio Grande Turkey.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Jordan Rios"

Video.summary: The Realtree Crew hunts the Texas Turkey opener and is able to tag a few tough working gobblers!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Cole Texas"

Video.summary: Join the Raskob family on a summertime adventure in the Florida Keys.
Video.title: "Raskob Lifestyle"

Video.summary: We are blessed for the opportunity to follow along the guys from Trinity Oaks for Bucks for the Brave. The men and women that served in our armed services and as first responders, had jobs that required the, to be willing to sacrifice their own lives every day, in order to protect or save someone else's. Not many of us can say that, nor understand what that truly means. The things they've had to see, and the sacrifices they've made in their daily lives, can have a profound impact on them. Trinity Oaks' Bucks for the Brave platform allows the loved ones and communities that support these heroes to share their stories and unite us all in honoring and recognizing their service to our great nation. We are proud to continue to be a part of this incredible program, getting these heroes in the outdoors for the hunt of a lifetime.
Video.title: "Trinity Oaks - Bucks for the Brave"

Video.summary: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they chase Whitetails at Morrow Ranch. This is a hunt that they had purchased earlier at the Disabled Outdoorsman in the year to be able to spend some time in the woods. A few days away to relax and spend quality time with loved ones should always be a priority. Morrow Ranch is definitely a go to place for low fence Texas hunting.
Video.title: "Morrow Ranch"

Video.summary: Buckmasters, Honey Brake and Realtree have joined forces with Big Dream Outdoors to get Justin Webb and Brandi Deese a grand slam on video this spring. Justin completes the first leg of the slam with a 2-for-1 Osceola special. Next stop-Texas for the Rio!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Big Osceola Dreams"

Video.summary: Jared's teams up with long time friend and fellow guide, Capt. Greg Dini, to conquer the patch reef.
Video.title: "Mutton Mania"

Video.summary: Trenton is headed to meet up with Andrew Norbye on Lake Guntersville in Alabama. With not a lot of current being pulled, the deep schools weren’t set up to feed. So they went up shallow to fish grass until evening time when the ledge fish really started biting.
Video.title: "Doubled Up"

Video.summary: Huckberry's flagship adventure series is back in Japan and the DIRT crew is hungry as ever for adventure. This time, they’re diving into the Kansai region—where millennia-old traditions flow from the shore of Lake Biwa to surf breaks on the coast. Chef Coleman Griffin gives them a taste of the deep cultural immersion that inspires his culinary practice, from chef knives descended from samurai swords to fermented carp that went on to spawn sushi. And turns out, the perfect meal does exist, and the crew knew it as soon as they had a bite of their final omakase.
Video.title: DIRT - "Japanese Sushi Origins, Samurai Steel & Rich Culinary Traditions"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Japanese Sushi Origins, Samurai Steel & Rich Culinary Traditions"
DIRT - "Japanese Sushi Origins, Samurai Steel & Rich Culinary Traditions"
DIRT - "Japanese Sushi Origins, Samurai Steel & Rich Culinary Traditions"

Video.summary: Meet Ryan, a seasoned St. Petersburg guide, fighting tides, time, and the last great tarpon run of the season.
Video.title: "Ryan Harrington"

Video.summary: Shot through the neck on Fort Hood in Texas, Green Beret John Arroyo recounts coming face to face with his attacker and Jesus blinding his would be killer.
Video.title: "John Arroyo"

Video.summary: Nick hits the Islamorada backwaters with Bud N' Mary's legends Capts. Richard and Nick Stancyzk to tempt bonefish and permit on the flats.
Video.title: "Islamorada Bones and Permit"

Video.summary: Brandon fishes an insane grouper bite with his good buddy from Sodium Fishing Gear.
Video.title: "Seabass"

Video.summary: Qualifier 2 for the BaitFuel Fishing Tour is back in Quinte West, Ontario where the teams will fish this Largemouth Bass Only event on the water of the Bay of Quinte.
Video.title: BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 2 - Quinte West, Ontario"

Image.alt: BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 2 - Quinte West, Ontario"
BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 2 - Quinte West, Ontario"
BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 2 - Quinte West, Ontario"

Video.summary: Everything is bigger in Texas, including the stories. With the whitetail rut in the midwest winding down, the Winchester Life Crew of Chris Keefer, Casey Keefer, Nikki Boxler and Paul Sawyer head south to the Texas Panhandle with Winchesters in hand hoping to wrangle in a few Texas-sized giants.
Video.title: “Lonestar Legends”

Video.summary: The positive impact made by the shooting sports and recreational shooting to people across our country can’t be measured in just one story, so we have three. In Florida, Olympian Dania Vizzi trains at her home shooting facility and talk about how she went from ballerina to one of the best shotgun shooters in the world. In Nebraska, firearms instructor Thea Van Syoc has used the disciplines of competitive pistol shooting and training to help shape her life. Finally we’ll take a look into the National African American Gun Association and learn how one day at the range for Phillip Smith created the fastest growing firearm organization in the United States.
Video.title: “Shooting is Life”

Video.summary: The boys are in Missouri at the Raven and they are ready to burn some powder and get rifle season kicked off at the Raven.
Video.title: "Rifle Camp At The Raven"

Video.summary: Earlier in the year, Phillip Culpepper experiences a rough go at hunting Osceola turkeys in southern Florida. Here, he returns for a come-back trip. Turkey hunting requires patience and persistence. So, never give up on that bird.
Video.title: "Hens Walk Him Right To Us | Sweet Osceola Redemption"

Image.alt: "Hens Walk Him Right To Us | Sweet Osceola Redemption"
"Hens Walk Him Right To Us | Sweet Osceola Redemption"
"Hens Walk Him Right To Us | Sweet Osceola Redemption"

Video.summary: JP tows his boat to the Florida Keys to try and figure out the fishing down in Florida Bay.
Video.title: "Figuring Out Florida"

Video.summary: Highlights from Capt. Blair's recent travels.
Video.title: "Bits & Bites"

Video.summary: From Miami to Apalachicola Bay, Florida, Capt. Jonathan Moss revisits some of his favorite moments from this season.
Video.title: "From Bow to Stern"

Video.summary: Captain Mike Anderson and Captain Sebastian Velez get on a great Trout bite in their home waters.
Video.title: "Backyard Trout"

Video.summary: Josh and Alex explore the SS United States; the world‘s largest artificial reef.
Video.title: "Wrecked Em'"

Video.summary: Low turkey population densities and the rocky, steep terrain of New York State's Adirondack Mountains create a unique spring turkey hunting challenge only found in this region of the country. It's not always easy to find wild turkeys here, but when you can, there is always the chance that this bird has never been hunted making success particularly special.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Join Mark Peterson as he ventures into Croatia’s wild heart, hot on the trail of a legendary stag. In the midst of the rutting season’s deafening roars, tensions escalate as Mark closes the distance. - Equipped with his Gunwerks 7LRM, things get dicey as Mark is face to face with a roaring stag at 12 yards!
Video.title: "Roaring Stag at 12 Yards"

Video.summary: Over a decade after the game changing Longbeard XR was introduced by Winchester, the wait is finally over for their next ground breaking turkey load. After years of perfecting the recipe behind the scenes, Winchester finally unveiled the new Longbeard TSS at a turkey camp in northern Michigan. First watch the jaw dropping Longbeard TSS pattern board testing, then see it go to work on some spring gobblers.
Video.title: "Longbeard Mitten Mayhem"

Video.summary: Overview: East Alton, Illinois is the home of Winchester Ammunition and the manufacturing home of the shotshell plants that build and produce millions of rounds of ammo for hunters, sport shooters, military and law enforcement. Get an unprecedented inside look at the birth cycle of a shotshell inside the walls of Winchester. From hull to primer, shot to wad and packaging to shipping, watch how the most legendary and successful ammunition brand in the world comes to is born and built.
Video.title: "Building The Legend"

Video.summary: Mike has had some challenging hunts for turkeys in Colorado. This trip was really not any different with plenty of highs and lows. Thankfully, on Day 5 luck favored on his side. Checkout this unique bowhunt for Colorado Hybrid Rios!
Video.title: "DIY Colorado Hybrid Gobbler Bowhunt – Tagged Out!"

Image.alt: "DIY Colorado Hybrid Gobbler Bowhunt – Tagged Out!"
"DIY Colorado Hybrid Gobbler Bowhunt – Tagged Out!"
"DIY Colorado Hybrid Gobbler Bowhunt – Tagged Out!"

Video.summary: We were honored to be a part of the Gold Star Youth Outdoors Turkey Hunt at Iron Horse Farms in Alabama. Cole Barthel and Bryan Brown were able to get Charlie Willington his first turkey. Be sure to check out Gold Star Youth Outdoors and Iron Horse Farms.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Gold Star Youth Turkey"

Video.summary: We join Blake Barnett alongside hunter Jimmy Reynolds as they take part in the 2nd Annual Pierce Dutton Memorial Hunt. This meaningful whitetail hunt is made possible by the great folks at Disabled Outdoorsmen. Jimmy settles in at the G2 Ranch in South Texas, where prime whitetail country and a shared passion for the outdoors set the stage for an unforgettable hunt.
Video.title: "Disabled Outdoorsmen"

Video.summary: Realtree's David Blanton heads south of the border to hunt the Gould's turkey with Jay Scott Outdoors. - For more info on hunting with Jay Scott Outdoors: visit www.gouldsturkeyhunt.com
Video.title: "Hunting GOULD'S Gobblers in Mexico | Realtree's "

Video.summary: This episode of Huckberry Homes brings us out to the Western Slope, just a few miles outside of Vail, Colorado to visit our longtime friend and collaborator Sinuhe Xavier. When he's not traveling the world shooting commercials and making short films, Xavier's at home in his quiet, perfectly appointed retreat deep in the Rockies here he's a three hour drive from Red Rock desert and a ten minute drive from some of the best snowboarding in the world. There was plenty of magic in Sinuhe's spot, from his BMW GS to his exploration of how his love for his son shaped the design and decoration of his pad.
Video.title: "Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Sinuhe Xavier"

Image.alt: "Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Sinuhe Xavier"
"Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Sinuhe Xavier"
"Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Sinuhe Xavier"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson is south of the border in Veracruz, Mexico going after a Mexican Gulf Coast Whitetail. When the whitetail action slowed down, Mark tried his luck at a spot-and stalk hunt for White-lipped Peccary. With hot temps, Mark and company try to find water that the Peccary will be targeting to stay hydrated.
Video.title: "Spot and Stalk White - Lipped Peccary"

Video.summary: Randy, Cody, and Big Rig are still in Oklahoma with a long list of work to get done before fall comes. From moving blinds around to filling feeders the work never ends.
Video.title: "Summer Prep In Oklahoma"
